title: PRA Legal Instruments - 2026

# PRA Legal Instruments - 2026

- **PRA2026/6**: PRA Rulebook: CRR Firms: (CRR) Amendment Instrument 2026 (Published: 05/03/2026)

- **PRA2026/4**: PRA Rulebook: Non-CRR Firms: Credit Unions Instrument 2026 (Published: 20/02/2026)
- **PRA2026/3**: PRA Rulebook: CRR Firms: SDDT Regime Instrument 2026 (Published: 20/01/2026)
- **PRA2026/2**: PRA Rulebook: CRR Firms: (CRR No. 2) Instrument 2026 (Published: 20/01/2026)
- **PRA2026/1**: PRA Rulebook: CRR Firms: (CRR) Instrument 2026 (Published: 20/01/2026)
